experiment: B10: B2 + DMSK-Skip-lite at encoder 1/4 feature
note: B10 keeps the complete B2 framework and adds one morphology/scale-adaptive dynamic kernel module to the ResNet34 1/4 skip feature. It introduces no new boundary/rim supervision, no additional segmentation loss, and no multi-scale RBSG gate.

design_references.title: Enhancing feature fusion of U-like networks with dynamic skip connections
I2U-Net: A dual-path U-Net with rich information interaction
design_references.adopted_idea: reuse high-resolution detail and semantic information in U-like networks

dmsk_skip.residual_projection_init: final BatchNorm scale initialized to zero
